Video.summary: In "The Family", Ed is going on an out-of-town trip...but Eunice and Mickey want to come along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Robert Goulet, Rich Little & Pat Carroll guest. Rich impresses while Robert & Pat join "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Video.summary: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Rock Hudson plays a man on the prowl for the ladies in a bar. Also, Tim is a television announcer.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Guest Neil Sedaka joins the gang for a set of commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his eleventh and final season premiere guest star spot!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tim Conway's engagement ring for Carol, made from the cursed Hope Diamond, causes no end of bad luck.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shani Wallis, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell & Ken Berry join in "High Hat", a spoof of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers movie musicals.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby appear in "Science Fiction Playhouse." "Carol & Sis" features Carol intoxicated.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell guest stars! He plays a member of "The Family." Also: movie spoof "The Lady Heir."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Broadway legend Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone join for an installment of "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars, spoofing "Love In An Avalanche," which makes way for a more tropically based number.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters stars in a sketch about a woman introducing friends to each other. Also, an office visit.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars as a hapless bus boy at a "Beniha-ha" restaurant who steps into an absent chef's role.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell and The Jackson 5 guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Roddy McDowall, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Ken Berry joins a salute to Warner Brothers, with spoofs of "Mrs. Skeffington" and "Yankee Doodle Dandy."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke & Tony Randall star! Includes Dick as a salesman, and Carol & Tony as marrieds.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays the director of a play put on by the P.T.A., and a hitman hired to kill Carol's husband.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Alice Portnoy is back to wreak more havoc, featuring guest Ronnie Schell and a "Carol & Sis" saga sketch.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Ronnie Schell

Video.summary: John Byner and Petula Clark head downtown to the show.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: Guest Martha Raye drags Carol to The Tomcat Club. Also featured: "Carol & Sis" and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns as a guest! Sketches include Harvey as a hammy actor, and Jim as an emergency room patient.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Comedian Alan King guest stars as Carol's distracted psychiatrist.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as Tim's girlfriend in a sketch where he is honored with a ship. And, a spoof of "Jaws."
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Jack Palance guests, appearing in a gangster sketch. Carol and Roger meet Chris' new beau in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Palance

Video.summary: Features commercial spoofs, Harvey trying to give a speech, and Carol demonstrating how nobody notices her.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol introduces the actors who dub voices for Spanish audiences, using a classic "Carol & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife plagued by her husband's gambling. Meanwhile, a touring star takes the stage.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Ken Berry joins Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim for the musical movie spoof "Stolen Serenade."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy." Dick Cavett crashes Q&A .
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry takes part in a series of sketches highlighted by his role as a lawyer facing off with Tim.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson all appear as guests on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Tim Conway guest, with Martha in a sketch about mothers, and Tim as "The Virgin Prince."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Sid Caesar and Barbara McNair guest. McNair and Carol spoof a series, and "V.I.P." features silent film stars.
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Paul Sand & Eydie Gorme guest. Includes salute to series like "Dr. Kildaire", and Paul & Eydie join a sketch.
Video.title: Paul Sand, Eydie Gorrme

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Mr. Steve Lawrence joins Carol in a sketch about a traveling couple sharing some honesty with each other.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: David Frost and Marilyn Horne star. Frost plays a Rolls Royce dealer, while Horne takes the musical spotlight.
Video.title: Marilyn Horne, David Frost
